q: If the equilibrium constant is _______ than 1, the equilibrium lies to the right, and there are more products than reactants. 2026
If the external factors are altered, the system will shift to a _______ state of equilibrium. 2026
_______ is a system that allows energy to enter and exist, but matter can neither be gained nor lost. 2026
At _______, the rates of forward and reverse reactions are equal. 2026
If the K_eq value is _______, the equilibrium lies to the right and there are more products than reactants.
A _______ reaction is a reaction that can proceed in both directions.
If the K_eq value is _______, the equilibrium lies to the left. 2026
In equilibrium the forward and reverse reactions are still proceeding at an equal _______. 2025
The equilibrium constant provides how far a reaction has gone towards _______ before it reaches equilibrium. 2025
The equilibrium constant K_p can be given as the ratio of the _______ of products and reactants.
There are two types of equilibrium; _______ equilibrium and dynamic equilibrium. 2025
Le Chatelier's principle is a _______ guide to the effect of changes in concentration, temperature and pressure on a system at equilibrium. 2025
Closed system allows energy to enter and exit, but _______ can neither be gained nor lost. 2025
Reversible reactions that happen in a _______ system eventually reach equilibrium. 2025
When the concentration of a reactant is increased on equilibrium system, the system responds by _______ the concentration of the reactant.
If a reversible reaction is in a closed system, the system can reach a state called a _______ equilibrium. 2025
In many equilibrium systems, the substances involved are _______ all in the same phase. 2025
In methanol production, the reaction is carried out at a temperature of 250°C using the catalyst _______. 2025
If the number of moles of gas is the same on both sides of the reversible chemical equation, _______ has no effect. 2026
Fuels are burned in air to produce carbon dioxide and water, and this reaction goes to _______. 2026
The equilibrium in which the reactants and products of a chemical equilibrium are all in a single phase is called _______ equilibrium.
